steps.title: Set up the system of equations
steps.content:
Let $n$ = number of novels and $m$ = number of magazines.

Since there are 14 total items: $$n + m = 14$$
Since the total cost is $34: $$5n + m = 34$$

steps.title: Solve by elimination
steps.content:
Subtract the first equation from the second to eliminate $m$:
$$(5n + m) - (n + m) = 34 - 14$$
Simplify: $$4n = 20$$
Divide both sides by 4: $$n = 5$$
That matches Choice B — 5.
